economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises including catering, gas bars, building supplies, food stores, power corporation, bus lines, motor hotel, high speed internet, VLT program, and partnerships. Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership investment recorded at cost. Settlement Trusts managed.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to confirm completeness of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280. Nation is in Manitoba, not Alberta. Large consolidation of 36+ entities including trusts, LPs, and corporations. GBEs (4 entities) accounted for by modified equity method including NCN Thompson Bus Lines LP, NCN Thompson Bus Ltd., NAC NCN LP, NAC NCN GP Ltd. Investments in partnerships ($205M) primarily Wuskwatim Power LP at cost. Capital construction in progress of $101.6M not yet transferred to TCA. Deferred expenditures of $6.25M relate to interest on loans repayable from Wuskwatim profits. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Province of Manitoba + Manitoba Hydro + First Peoples Development Inc. + Northern Regional Health Authority + Economic Climate Change Canada + Manitoba Kaewatinow Okimakanak. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text.
